<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
## Task: flt-it8.32.17 — Android static analysis rollout

### Issue Details
Add Android lint and detekt into the governance flow once the Gradle setup and test base are ready.

### Deliverables (from plan)
- Android lint in CI
- `detekt` Gradle integration
- Thresholds only after meaningful Android tests exist

### Current State
- There may or may not be an `android/` directory in this repo — check first
- `scripts/ci/run-static-analyzers.sh` exists with gosec, govulncheck, semgrep
- The plan says "thresholds only after meaningful Android tests exist" — so this may be mostly scaffolding/documentation

What's needed:
1. First, check if an `android/` directory exists in the repo. If not, this is documentation/scaffolding only.
2. Add Android lint and detekt sections to `scripts/ci/run-static-analyzers.sh` (same graceful-skip pattern)
3. If Android code exists: add `detekt` config file, Gradle integration
4. If no Android code yet: create `docs/ci/android-analysis.md` documenting the plan for when Android code lands
5. A `make android-lint` Makefile target (that gracefully skips if no Android dir)

### IMPORTANT: Follow CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md conventions
- Read CLAUDE.md at the repo root before starting
- Don't over-engineer — if no Android code exists, keep this lightweight (docs + scaffolding)
- Same graceful-skip pattern as existing analyzers

### Quality Gates
Since this likely only touches CI/scripts files:
```
make api-test-unit && make api-lint
```

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/android-analysis"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on
your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

</teammate-message>

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run available static analyzers, skip gracefully if not installed.
# Exit code: 0 = no findings (or no tools installed), 1 = findings reported.
set -euo pipefail

repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
cd "$repo_root"

FINDINGS=0
RAN=0

# --- gosec ---
if command -v gosec &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== gosec ==="
    if (cd api && gosec ./...); then
        echo "gosec: clean"
    else
        echo "gosec: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "gosec not installed — skipping"
fi

# --- govulncheck ---
if command -v govulncheck &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== govulncheck ==="
    if (cd api && govulncheck ./...); then
        echo "govulncheck: clean"
    else
        echo "govulncheck: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "govulncheck not installed — skipping"
fi

# --- semgrep ---
if command -v semgrep &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== semgrep ==="
    if semgrep --config auto --quiet .; then
        echo "semgrep: clean"
    else
        echo "semgrep: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "semgrep not installed — skipping"
fi

if [[ "$RAN" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "No static analyzers installed. Install gosec, govulncheck, or semgrep for enhanced checks."
fi

exit "$FINDINGS"

## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile — delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present — makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
        api-lint api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
        lint \
        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        test-quick test-standard test-full \
        ci-changed ci-full hooks-install \
        help

## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
api-run-worker:
	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
api-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
api-seed:
	$(MAKE) -C api seed

## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
api-dev-token:
	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql → :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
web-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
	@echo ""
	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## test-quick: Fast checks — Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation — quick + web unit tests + Go lint (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint

## test-full: Complete validation — standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
test-full: test-standard api-test

## ci-changed: Run risk-aware checks on changed files (vs origin/main)
ci-changed:
	bash scripts/ci/run-changed.sh

## ci-full: Run full-repo policy and analyzer checks
ci-full:
	bash scripts/ci/run-full.sh

## hooks-install: Configure git to use .githooks/ for pre-commit and pre-push
hooks-install:
	bash scripts/install-hooks.sh

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@echo ""
	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
	@echo ""
	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
		done

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run full-repo policy and analyzer checks.
# Usage: run-full.sh
#
# Environment:
#   FLOTSAM_STRICT=1  — exit non-zero on any failure (default: advisory)
set -euo pipefail

repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
cd "$repo_root"

STRICT="${FLOTSAM_STRICT:-0}"
EXIT_CODE=0

# --- Step 1: Risk classification (full repo) ---
echo "=== Risk Classification (full repo) ==="
python3 scripts/ci/detect-risk.py --all --severity-threshold critical || true
echo ""

# --- Step 2: Test standard ---
echo "=== Test Standard ==="
if ! make test-standard; then
    echo "test-standard FAILED"
    EXIT_CODE=1
fi
echo ""

# --- Step 3: Static analyzers ---
echo "=== Static Analyzers ==="
if ! bash scripts/ci/run-static-analyzers.sh; then
    echo "Static analysis reported findings"
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
fi
echo ""

# --- Step 4: Policy checks ---
echo "=== Policy Checks ==="
if ! bash scripts/ci/check-doc-commands.sh; then
    echo "Doc command audit found mismatches"
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
fi
if ! python3 scripts/ci/check-placeholders.py; then
    echo "Placeholder check found mismatches"
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
fi
echo ""

# --- Summary ---
if [[ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]]; then
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        echo "FAILED — strict mode, exiting with error."
    else
        echo "Issues found (advisory mode — not blocking)."
        EXIT_CODE=0
    fi
else
    echo "All checks passed."
fi

exit "$EXIT_CODE"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run available static analyzers, skip gracefully if not installed.
# Exit code: 0 = no findings (or no tools installed), 1 = findings reported.
set -euo pipefail

repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
cd "$repo_root"

FINDINGS=0
RAN=0

# --- gosec ---
if command -v gosec &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== gosec ==="
    if (cd api && gosec ./...); then
        echo "gosec: clean"
    else
        echo "gosec: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "gosec not installed — skipping"
fi

# --- govulncheck ---
if command -v govulncheck &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== govulncheck ==="
    if (cd api && govulncheck ./...); then
        echo "govulncheck: clean"
    else
        echo "govulncheck: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "govulncheck not installed — skipping"
fi

# --- semgrep ---
if command -v semgrep &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== semgrep ==="
    if semgrep --config auto --quiet .; then
        echo "semgrep: clean"
    else
        echo "semgrep: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "semgrep not installed — skipping"
fi

if [[ "$RAN" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "No static analyzers installed. Install gosec, govulncheck, or semgrep for enhanced checks."
fi

exit "$FINDINGS"

    else
        echo "govulncheck: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "govulncheck not installed — skipping"
fi

# --- semgrep ---
if command -v semgrep &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== semgrep ==="
    if semgrep --config auto --quiet .; then
        echo "semgrep: clean"
    else
        echo "semgrep: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "semgrep not installed — skipping"
fi

if [[ "$RAN" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "No static analyzers installed. Install gosec, govulncheck, or semgrep for enhanced checks."
fi

exit "$FINDINGS"

## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile — delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present — makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
        api-lint api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
        lint \
        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        test-quick test-standard test-full \
        ci-changed ci-full hooks-install \
        help

## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
api-run-worker:
	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
api-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
api-seed:
	$(MAKE) -C api seed

## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
api-dev-token:
	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql → :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
web-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
	@echo ""
	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## test-quick: Fast checks — Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation — quick + web unit tests + Go lint (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint

## test-full: Complete validation — standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
test-full: test-standard api-test

## ci-changed: Run risk-aware checks on changed files (vs origin/main)
ci-changed:
	bash scripts/ci/run-changed.sh

## ci-full: Run full-repo policy and analyzer checks
ci-full:
	bash scripts/ci/run-full.sh

## hooks-install: Configure git to use .githooks/ for pre-commit and pre-push
hooks-install:
	bash scripts/install-hooks.sh

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@echo ""
	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
	@echo ""
	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
		done
